finding_results.notes: Four of the five cited Petra speeches revised. (1) Line 316: protocols diagnosis now has a false start ('found — protocols had been followed'), operational specifics ('Right forms, right intervals, right language'), and personal frustration ('I kept waiting for someone to ask') replacing the clean aphorism 'Nobody asked whether the protocols were the problem.' Narrator commentary admiring the line delivery removed. (2) Lines 328-332: 'This is the first thing that shows me what it costs' replaced with messier speech; Yusuf now interjects ('And this') mid-monologue, breaking Petra's thesis delivery and forcing her to land on a less polished conclusion ('Which at least tells me what the tradeoff is'). (3) Line 338: the balanced 'Not because X / Not because Y / That's the calculation I'm making' antithesis broken into a false start ('Not because I —'), hedging ('I'm not pretending the archive isn't a problem'), and a less quotable conclusion ('Those are the two things I'm weighing'). (4) Line 399: the balanced 'If you're wrong X / If you're right Y' antithesis replaced with concrete operational language ('reproducible, something independent,' 'they will call it defamation,' 'you've told them what to scrub'). Line 403 ('At least one of us is planning') retained as a minor quip rather than a thesis delivery. All five original decisions and institutional stakes preserved: Petra's past failure, her choice not to report, conditions, evidence-handling warning, and clinical review demand.

pass_summaries.summary: Updated Petra's Stuttgart anecdote to the canonical Marius Koch case, replaced the off-register vocal descriptor with Petra-true qualifier loss, and removed the chapter's singular 'display' repetition while preserving the existing chapter engine and ending state.

Single finding addressed across four edits to Petra's dialogue in the confrontation scene. Replaced composed thesis-delivery with pressure-true speech: false starts, hedging, self-correction, Yusuf interjection breaking a monologue, and concrete operational language replacing balanced antithesis. Same decisions, same stakes, messier arrival. Narrator commentary admiring Petra's line delivery also removed. No continuity, setup, or state-shift changes.

Addressed the packet's prose finding by removing second-order thematic paraphrase after the chapter's strongest images and letting the sensory blackout display, the note-taking sequence, and the final latency readout carry the implication.
